seo.h1: Send Flowers, Cakes & Gifts Online in India
seo.intro: WithLoveNRegards is Pune's trusted online florist and gifting destination. From fresh hand-tied bouquets and freshly baked cakes to premium chocolates and curated combos, we help you celebrate every moment with same-day delivery across Pune, Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Kolkata and Gurgaon.

blocks.h2: Fresh Flower Delivery for Every Occasion
blocks.body: Whether it's an anniversary, a birthday or a simple gesture of love, our florists hand-pick the freshest seasonal blooms. Choose from roses, lilies, carnations, orchids and mixed bouquets, each arranged with care and delivered fresh to your door.
Pair your flowers with a freshly baked cake or a box of premium chocolates. Our combos bring together blooms and sweets for double the joy, making gifting effortless and memorable.
Order before 5 PM IST and enjoy same-day delivery in our serviceable cities. With secure payments and reliable doorstep delivery, sending gifts has never been easier.

announcement: Same Day Delivery Available — Order before 5 PM

promise.heading: Our Promise to You
promise.subtext: Real flowers, real care — backed by guarantees, not just words.

items.title: 7-Day Freshness Guarantee
items.body: If your blooms wilt within 7 days, we replace them free — no questions asked.

items.title: On-Time, Every Time
items.body: Order before 5 PM for guaranteed same-day delivery, with live order tracking.

items.title: Handcrafted by Local Florists
items.body: Every arrangement is hand-tied to order — what you see in the photo is what arrives.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.text: The bouquet looked exactly like the photo — fresh, beautifully wrapped and delivered within hours. My mom was genuinely thrilled.

items.name: Rahul Mehta
items.text: Ordered a cake-and-flowers combo for my anniversary at the last minute. Same-day delivery actually worked, and the quality was premium.

items.name: Ananya Iyer
items.text: I was nervous ordering flowers online, but the freshness guarantee won me over. They stayed beautiful for over a week. Will order again.

items.name: Vikram Desai
items.text: Sent roses to my wife while travelling. Smooth ordering, real-time updates, and she said they were the freshest she's received.

items.name: Sneha Kulkarni
items.text: Lovely packaging and a handwritten note included. It felt personal and thoughtful — exactly what gifting should feel like.

items.name: Arjun Nair
items.text: Delivery was on time and the chocolates were fresh. Took one star off only because I wanted more wrapping options — otherwise great.
